title: [MTR] 서울메트로 GEC | Seoul Metro 3000series GEC
description: This GEC chopper-controlled EMU operated on Seoul Subway Line 3 for MTR. Built by lotty_lee
body:
![Seoul Metro 3000series GEC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dc569ca7ccff64c31de14e0a3edf54c7a40a848.png)
### About train : 
This GEC chopper-controlled EMU operated on Seoul Subway Line 3.

It was the first in Korea to feature a wide-body design, featuring convex doors and a front-facing emergency escape hatch.
It entered service with the opening of Seoul Subway Line 3, and all trains were retired on September 30, 2022.

### How to use? : 
The pack adds this train to Minecraft through the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod version 4 (MTR4).
The actual Seoul Subway Line 3 train consists of 10 cars, but depending on your computer's specifications,
I recommend using 4-, 6-, or 8-car trains.
Below is the configuration of a 10-car train for reference.

(Front) TC - M - M' - M - M' - T - T -M - M' - TC (Rear)

### Include : 
Seoul metro line3 3000series GEC

This pack includes Tc (front), Tc (rear), m', and m cars.
(I skipped the T cars because it was too much trouble.)

### For korean
(It's the same as above)

3호선 미개조GEC초퍼 전동차입니다.

MTR4에 리소스팩 추가하셔서 사용하시면 됩니다.

컴퓨터 사양에따라 편성당 칸수를 조절해주세요.
